title: TATA Mine Navigation
excerpt: A geospatial navigation tool tailored for complex mining site visitors.
details: Designed to solve navigation challenges for senior visitors at TATA Steel mines. Unlike standard trackers, this project focused on mapping. I implemented the Leaflet Omnivore library to parse raw KML map files, creating a Google Maps-style interface. Users can click key locations in a popup list to automatically scroll and focus on specific mine zones, significantly improving on-site orientation.

title: Reading Room Manager
excerpt: A cost-saving SaaS CRM replacing SMS costs with Firebase real-time sync.
details: Built to eliminate high SMS costs for a local business. This responsive web app (Vanilla JS + Tailwind) uses Firebase for real-time database management. Key features include a 'Soft UI' dashboard for occupancy tracking, automated WhatsApp integration for fee reminders, and a member directory with deep-links to direct chat. The system handles subscription expiry logic automatically.

title: UniTime PWA
excerpt: A university utility PWA handling complex scheduling and mess menus.
details: A Progressive Web App engineered to parse intricate university slot systems (A/B/C slots) and split afternoon sessions. Wrapped as a Trusted Web Activity (TWA) for Android, it features offline capabilities, a 'Hero Card' dashboard for next-class alerts, and a dynamic mess menu viewer with dietary filtering. Authentication is smoothed with a custom splash screen to eliminate UI flicker.

title: Carmel School Portal
excerpt: A digital presence solution with a zero-cost cloud storage backend.
details: Developed to modernize a local school's digital footprint. The standout technical achievement is the 'backend cost-free' gallery system. Instead of paid cloud storage, I engineered an admin workflow that utilizes the Google Drive API. School staff simply upload photos to a Drive folder, and the site dynamically fetches preview links to populate the gallery instantly.

title: Fly Store: Valentine's
excerpt: Shopify POD store powered by AI-generated UGC video marketing.
details: A Print-on-Demand apparel store launched for the Valentine's season. While built on Shopify, the technical highlight was the marketing workflow. I utilized Gemini’s Nano Banana model and Veo to generate realistic User Generated Content (UGC) video ads, establishing a tight workflow for rapid asset creation without physical photoshoots.

title: ProTrack
excerpt: A productivity PWA that gamifies task management and consistency.
details: ProTrack is a habit-building platform designed to keep users consistent. As a PWA, it offers native-like performance for tracking daily targets. Features include habit streak visualization, task generation controls, and focus timers, all wrapped in a gamified interface to encourage user retention and daily activity.

title: Glitch The Matrix
excerpt: An interactive, WebGL-powered promotional campaign site.
details: Built to promote an upcoming sci-fi indie game, 'Glitch The Matrix' pushes the boundaries of browser rendering. Using Three.js and custom shaders, users navigate through a 3D environment right from their browser, finding hidden clues about the game's lore.

title: CodeZ Platform
excerpt: An online learning portal for budding programmers.
details: CodeZ approached MAMBA to rethink how students learn to code online. We built an in-browser code editor paired with dynamic video lesson panels. The platform handles thousands of concurrent users running Python and JavaScript directly in the browser safely.
